en.tool.description: Enumerate top-level window titles on Windows and return structured JSON. Parameters: 'all' (include non-visible), 'pid' (include PID), 'class' (include window class name).
en.tool.system_prompt: This tool enumerates top-level window titles on Windows and returns structured JSON. It is Windows-only.

ja.tool.description: （日本語）Enumerate top-level window titles on Windows and return structured JSON. Parameters: 'all' (include non-visible), 'pid' (include PID), 'class' (include window class name).
ja.tool.system_prompt: （日本語）This ツール enumerates top-level window titles on Windows and 返します structured JSON. It is Windows-only.
